basic_details.job_title: Kannur University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Kannur University has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of Assistant Professor in Physical Education Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Candidates with Master's degree in Physical Education or any other relevant subjects with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade or an equivalent degree from an Indian/foreign University and NET/Ph.D. qualification can directly attend the interview on 13-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Physical Education or any other relevant subjects with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade or an equivalent degree from an Indian/foreign University and NET/Ph.D.

Kannur University Assistant Professor in Physical Education Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Kannur University Assistant Professor in Physical Education Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Kannur University recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Kannur University recruitment is Assistant Professor in Physical Education.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q3. What is the walk-in date for the Assistant Professor in Physical Education post?
faq.answer: The walk-in date for the Assistant Professor in Physical Education post is 13th July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Physical Education or a relevant subject with at least 55% marks, along with NET/Ph.D. qualification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for this position?
faq.answer: The position is on a daily wages basis.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: The official notification indicates 0 vacancies for the Assistant Professor in Physical Education post.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Kannur University, Kannur, Kerala.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original certificates, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Who can attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates with the specified educational qualifications and NET/Ph.D. can attend the walk-in interview.
